summary_one_line: Input must form a valid sfnt font (TrueType magic + recognized table tags) so shaping completes on a font with no custom destroy callback.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed sfnt header: the 4-byte sfnt version magic 00 01 00 00 at offset 0x00 plus recognized 4-byte table tags (e.g. 'GPOS') so the blob parses into a real hb_font_t whose font->destroy callback is null, taking the false branch at hb-font.cc:1973.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winning vpc seed begins with 00 01 00 00 (TrueType sfnt version) and carries the ASCII table tag 'GPOS' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f, so it parses as a valid sfnt font built through the default funcs path (W reaches hb_font_get_nominal_glyph_nil/_default, never sets custom destroy), and uniquely takes the false side (W T=0 F=1 at L1973).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The loser vp seeds carry mangled/short blobs (e.g. 'kern' tag with truncated tables, 31-71 byte inputs) that drive the loser-only glyph-extraction path (L reaches glyf_accelerator_t, has_func, hb_font_set_funcs) and never resolve the false branch (L T=48 F=0 at L1973 across 10/10 blocked trials).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace over value_profile; I2S substitution can plant the multi-byte sfnt magic 00 01 00 00 and table tags directly from intercepted CMP operands, constructing a parseable font that value_profile's CMP_MAP-distance feedback plus havoc struggles to assemble byte-by-byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the false branch of if (font->destroy) in hb_font_destroy.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
Source line:   if (font->destroy)
Globally blocked side: F  (false branch)

evidence_trail.claim: The winning seed begins with the TrueType sfnt version magic 00 01 00 00 and carries the GPOS table tag.
Only the winner reaches the false side; the loser takes the true side 48 times and never the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1973  T=0 F=1  T=48 F=0  if (font->destroy)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The winner exercises the nil/default glyph-funcs path while the loser exercises actual glyph extraction.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: 77         0  hb-font.cc:hb_font_get_nominal_glyph_nil(hb_font_t*, void*, unsigned int, unsigned int*, void*)  (/src/harfbuzz/src/hb-font.cc:125-128)

evidence_trail.claim: The loser-only path runs glyf accelerator construction and glyph extents that the winner never touches.
The loser value_profile seeds are short and carry mangled tags such as 'kern'.
value_profile_cmplog's only added mutator over value_profile is I2SRandReplace.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc plus token stack.
The decisive pair's technique delta is I2S, winner vpc resolves 8/10 and loser vp blocks 10/10.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5362 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 1cb3b750bf156a0a`; the chain has 50 ancestor levels and every ancestor carries a havoc/token mutator list (the tool reported 'No I2S-floor rows in this chain'). No dash-row I2S floor signal found, so I2S substitution is not directly confirmed in the recorded lineage; I2S contribution may still exist in the leaked havoc bucket since the floor is only a lower bound and the literal I2SRandReplace name is not logged in the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness that gates the false branch only on a valid sfnt magic 00 01 00 00 plus table tag would refute this if value_profile resolves it at the same rate as value_profile_cmplog, showing the I2S substitution confers no advantage in planting the multi-byte font header.

weakest_evidence_point: The I2S attribution is not confirmed by the lineage floor (all-havoc chain), so the assignment rests on the pair's technique delta and the multi-byte magic/tag structure rather than direct dash-row evidence.
